title: The Respectful Whore
writer: Alexandre Astruc, Jacques-Laurent Bost, Jean-Paul Sartre
actors: Barbara Laage, Ivan Desny, Walter Bryant
plot: Fred, the nephew of a senator,has murdered a Black man on a train. The two only witnesses are Lizzie McKay, a prostitute from New York, and Sidney, a colored man. Fred decides to seduce Lizzie in order to make her give false evide...
